line: - Updated `crates/saw-core/src/types.rs` to track recent file writes per path with a 5-minute window and reset state when a different file is modified.

items: Updated `crates/saw-core/src/types.rs` to track recent file writes per path with a 5-minute window and reset state when a different file is modified.

line: - Updated `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs` to classify `ToolLoop { file, count, since }` from `FileModified`-driven state first, with fallback to existing tool-call scoring.

items: Updated `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs` to classify `ToolLoop { file, count, since }` from `FileModified`-driven state first, with fallback to existing tool-call scoring.

line: - `FileModified` is the right source of truth for rewrite-loop detection because it captures watcher-observed rewrites and supports reset-on-different-file behavior cleanly.

items: `FileModified` is the right source of truth for rewrite-loop detection because it captures watcher-observed rewrites and supports reset-on-different-file behavior cleanly.

line: - `Instant` is suitable for sliding-window pruning, but reporting still needs paired wall-clock timestamps for `since`.

items: `Instant` is suitable for sliding-window pruning, but reporting still needs paired wall-clock timestamps for `since`.

line: - Kept the existing `compute_loop_score` path as fallback for older/tool-call-only state, but prioritized `AgentState` file-write tracking when recent watcher data exists.

items: Kept the existing `compute_loop_score` path as fallback for older/tool-call-only state, but prioritized `AgentState` file-write tracking when recent watcher data exists.

line: - Stored loop window data in non-serialized `AgentState` fields (`#[serde(skip, default)]`) so checkpoints remain compatible while live classification gets accurate timing.

items: Stored loop window data in non-serialized `AgentState` fields (`#[serde(skip, default)]`) so checkpoints remain compatible while live classification gets accurate timing.
